phrases.intent_en: Is the combined Kutná Hora ticket valid here
phrases.text_local: Platí tu kombinovaná vstupenka na Kutnou Horu?
phrases.cultural_note: A combined ticket covers multiple Kutná Hora sites.

phrases.intent_en: When is the least crowded time to visit
phrases.cultural_note: Small space, so early visits are best to avoid crowds.

likely_response.translation_en: Right in the morning at nine o'clock.

responses.english: Right in the morning at nine o'clock.

phrases.intent_en: Where is Rint's bone signature located
phrases.text_local: Kde je Rintův podpis z kostí?
phrases.cultural_note: František Rint's signature is made of bones, easy to miss.

likely_response.translation_en: On the wall to the right of the entrance.

responses.english: On the wall to the right of the entrance.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Schwarzenberg coat of arms
phrases.text_local: Kde je schwarzenberský erb z kostí?
phrases.cultural_note: The coat of arms is made of human bones, a key highlight.

likely_response.translation_en: To the right of the altar, on the wall.

responses.english: To the right of the altar, on the wall.
